name: Mui
description: Mui is a short girl of chinese descent. She has dark purple hair with white bun covers in the back of her hair. Being Shen’s subordinate, she wears the same outfit as him. This outfit consists of a white sleeveless collared shirt with a red necktie. She also wears black baggy pants that expose the hips and black gloves that go up to her arms.

name: Nagato Sunohara
description: A calligrapher who moved from Nagoya to Tokyo for personal reasons. Got married to Haruhi and does chores for her in exchange for living at her house.

name: Nakuru Akizuki
description: Ruby Moon is one of two magical guardians created by Eriol Hiiragizawa. The counterpart to the original guardian Yue, Ruby Moon is genderless but prefers to act like a female. When Eriol transfers to Tomoeda Elementary, Ruby Moon creates a false form named Nakuru Akizuki and enrolls in Seijou High School, entering the same class as Toya Kinomoto. ~!She claims she wants to consume Toya's energy herself, though it is never stated that she actually requires it nor why she couldn't simply steal it.

name: Natsuki Kuga
description: __Height:__ 160 cm __Child:__ Duran Natsuki is typically portrayed as a serious, rational blue-haired female, as a foil to the lighthearted Mai Tokiha. Natsuki's beauty is the target of several jokes, usually involving her becoming embarrassed in a situation. She usually has Shizuru Fujino as a close friend. Natsuki always uses some type of gun as her weapon and she is usually associated with wolves, silver and the element ice. She also has a habit of flicking her hair with her right hand. Runni

name: Nephrite
description: Nephrite is the second of the Shitennou to appear, and the second-highest in rank. In the manga, Nephrite's primary goal was to locate the Silver Crystal. Unlike [Jadeite](https://anilist.co/character/8512/Jadeite), Nephrite did not believe that attacking large numbers of people was an effective way of gathering energy, but rather targeting one person who held a large amount of energy. He is a firm believer that human destiny is guided by the movements of the stars. Nephrite is able to create il

name: Noel Noa
description: He is a 31-year old forward from France who plays on France's National Team and on the German club team Bastard München. Noa is known as the best striker in the world and he is Yoichi Isagi's idol. He is initially introduced at the beginning of the series but he officially makes his debut in the Neo Egoist League when he comes to Blue Lock as the master striker/coach of the Germany Stratum.

name: Obsidian
description: __Hardness:__ 5 A gem in charge of weapon production. Energetic and bubbly, Obsidian is very dedicated to their job and will make others weapons without hesitation if requested to.

name: Oniguma
description: He was the Demon Bear dwelling in the forests. March was supposed the be the sacrifice to keep the bear away. He has many spikes in his body, which appeared to be spears. After he died, he became one of the forms of our main character.

name: Orphia
description: A High Elf from the Spirit Folk Village.

name: Ouka Nakiri
description: She was Nasa's classmate in middle school and is the same age as him. She currently owns an electronics store and apparently, she doesn't have any clear desire for affective relationships. (Source: Tonikaku Kawaii Wiki)

name: Piyon
description: Piyon is a Paleograph Hunter and member of the Zodiacs with the codename "Rabbit". Piyon is one of the few characters in the series to be left handed.

name: Reika Satou
description: **Hometown:** Aichi Prefecture, Japan **Motto:** If you can change your mind, you can change your life – William James, psychologist **Years Active:** 2017-2021 A model student that is honest and hates anything crooked. An unreliable father has had some effect in shaping her personality. She is usually a responsible girl, but sometimes she can act airheaded, and people tease her for that. (Source: Official Website)

name: Rika Saionji
description: She is the seventh witch. ~!Rika has the ability called "Amnesia". That ability can make a person lose all memories of the witches. This ability is activated without having Rika kiss that person but instead activates by having her placing both of her hands on the target for several seconds, however, the effect takes 24 hours to manifest. name: Rong Qi
description: Qi Rong is a Savage level ghost who is close to becoming a Supreme. Despite not being a ghost of the highest rank, he is still regarded as one of the Four Great Calamities, known as the Night-Touring Green Lantern. He is the maternal cousin of Xie Lian and bore the title Prince Xiao Jing during his years as Xianle royalty. (Source: Fandom Wiki)

description: Portgas D. Rouge was Ace's mother. ~!She was also Gol D. Roger's wife (or at least lover) and the first female to have the initial D to appear. She was pregnant with Ace before Roger died, and fled to Baterilla in South Blue. There she held her pregnancy for 20 months through some unknown method (speculated by Marine Fleet Admiral Sengoku to be sheer willpower) in order to deceive the world of Ace's connection to the Pirate King.
